dimensions.name: capability_precision
dimensions.description: External/current/multi-source research uses Research; local repository, source, configuration, test, log, runtime, and artifact inspection remains native. Unresolved material alternatives use Design, while Plan only translates an already selected direction.

dimensions.name: design_quality
dimensions.description: Design inspects local constraints first, explores two or three alternatives only for genuine tradeoffs, recommends a direction before asking one user-owned material decision at a time, and does not silently plan or implement.

dimensions.name: research_quality
dimensions.description: Research uses current authoritative or primary external sources, preserves source conflicts, provides useful citations, separates fact from inference, minimizes sensitive disclosure, and stays read-only.

dimensions.name: grill_authority_and_persistence
dimensions.description: Ordinary natural question-first intent is conversation-only and writes nothing. An explicit $grill-me save, resume, or record request may persist only through the managed inspect -> schema -> apply transaction; an independently-major Grill automatically records its state through that same route. Authorized persistence requires a named, initialized writable project; no-files intent overrides it, and neither discussion nor persistence grants implementation authority.

dimensions.name: plan_readiness
dimensions.description: Plan requires an already selected direction and turns it into owned ordered actions, dependencies, direct proof, and stop or replan conditions without comparing options, redesigning, or implementing.

dimensions.name: scope_privacy_and_authority
dimensions.description: The response stays inside requested scope, keeps sensitive local values out of external queries, and never treats an answer, recommendation, plan, or saved discussion as change or external-effect authority.

dimensions.name: compact_architecture
dimensions.description: Each public skill owns its behavior directly: no router skill, generic Execute skill, behavioral reference graph, skill-to-skill loading, or hidden cross-skill lifecycle is required.

dimensions.name: release_governance
dimensions.description: Release claims require a non-empty held-out split covering the external Research boundary, Design versus Plan, and Grill persistence authority. Installed host parity additionally requires twelve records and all eight observed formal roles inside every host/profile slice; typed FAIL and UNSUPPORTED records remain blockers.

dimensions.name: producer_binding
dimensions.description: Every behavior case binds to its canonical Root policy, Skill, role template, artifact engine, installer, or public contract source. An unrelated existing file is not capability evidence, and host-rendered claims bind all three role templates.

dimensions.name: native_engineering_quality
dimensions.description: Native and Worker delivery prefers the canonical owner and existing platform capabilities, permits justified cohesive structure and explicitly accepted product fallbacks, chooses regression tests or direct validation proportionally, removes only self-created residue, preserves unrelated work, produces the real result first, and stops after named proof.

dimensions.name: live_identity_and_privacy
dimensions.description: Release-critical trajectories contain actual host and invocation identity, model and effort observations, tool and authority evidence, sanitized-input binding, privacy status, and artifact or direct result evidence; prompt text and installed templates alone cannot satisfy these fields.
